title: TagoIO Device Data Item
description: A single measurement or data point sent to or retrieved from a TagoIO device.

variable.description: The variable name for the data point.

value.description: The value of the measurement. Can be a string, number, or boolean.

location.description: Geographic coordinates associated with the data point.

time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp or Unix timestamp string for the data point.

group.description: Unique grouping ID for the data point. Widgets often group data by this field.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. Most widgets will display this alongside the value.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to the data point to influence widget behavior or store additional information.

id.description: Unique identifier assigned by TagoIO to the data record (returned on retrieval).

device.description: Device ID that owns this data record (returned on retrieval).

origin.description: Origin identifier indicating the source that created the record.
